judge_reason: Description A details a blue stamp with specific text ('INTERNAL SECURITY - FB 1', etc.) and handwritten dates/times, while Description B describes a different document header and content with no mention of this stamp, indicating descriptions of different visual content.
original_image_tags: A scanned archival document. It is a typed memorandum from the United States Government on aged paper. There are two punch holes at the top center. The text is a carbon copy or duplicate with some faint, mirrored impressions of text from another page visible at the top. A blue stamp in the lower center reads "INTERNAL SECURITY - FB 1", "RECEIVED", and "LIAISON SECTION". Handwritten next to the stamp are dates "18", "21", "29" and times "2:19 PM 47", "3:33 PM 47", "19/47".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned page of a typed document, faint and mirrored from the reverse side, with three black punch holes at the top and a blue circular received stamp near the lower center.*
